title: Document Implement External Guardrail Templates And Prompt Loading

handoff_summary.completed: Documented the current implementation in `specs/specialized-agent-guardrails.md`, including the `templates/agents/*.md` layout, `guardrail_template_path(...)` and `load_guardrail_template(...)` loading flow, prompt injection of template path plus Markdown body, missing-template `FileNotFoundError` behavior, and the test coverage currently present for developer/review prompt generation and missing-template failure.
handoff_summary.remaining: Broader feature work still described in the spec but not delivered by this documentation bead remains unchanged: persisting applied guardrails in metadata or execution history, exposing that context via `bead show`, and adding explicit blocked role-scope handling beyond prompt instructions.
handoff_summary.risks: Low. The doc now explicitly distinguishes the B0003-delivered slice from the larger feature spec, which should reduce mismatch risk with the current code. Future implementation beads should keep this section aligned if prompt loading semantics change.
handoff_summary.next_action: Continue the remaining guardrail feature beads and update this spec again when metadata visibility or blocked role-scope handling lands.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: Low. Only `specs/specialized-agent-guardrails.md` was changed in this bead, but downstream agents editing the same spec should preserve the new B0003 implementation snapshot and acceptance-slice notes so the doc stays aligned with `src/codex_orchestrator/prompts.py` and `tests/test_orchestrator.py`.

conflict_risks: Low. execution_history.summary: Updated the specialized guardrails spec to document the shipped external template and prompt-loading behavior for B0003 and to separate that delivered slice from broader follow-up work.
